summary: Round 3 testing of Broad app - three major fixes: (1) Live Ride map stability via postMessage, (2) Crew picker with user search, (3) SVG vector illustrations. Backend: 40/42 tests passed (95.2%). Frontend: All Round 3 features working. Fixed critical plan.tsx bug (missing conditional for place picker).

minor.issue: Test data pollution - user name changed to 'TEST_Full Update' from previous test runs
minor.note: Not a real bug - just test data pollution from profile update tests

fixed_bugs.issue: Place picker missing conditional rendering - was always rendered, overlaying crew picker

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: GET /api/users/search endpoint working perfectly (8/8 tests passed)
✓ Backend: Search requires auth, returns empty for q<2 chars, excludes self, case-insensitive
✓ Backend: Cross-user search returns Alice Demo and Pallav Kumar users
✓ Backend: Result structure correct (id, name, email), no password_hash or emergency_contacts
✓ Backend: All regression tests passed (trips, discover, convoy, sos, places, profile)
✓ Frontend: Crew picker working after fixing critical conditional rendering bug
✓ Frontend: ADD RIDER button opens crew picker (testID=plan-crew-add)
✓ Frontend: Crew search input triggers API call after 2 chars (testID=plan-crew-search)
✓ Frontend: Search results show registered riders with 'REGISTERED RIDER' label and email
✓ Frontend: Custom name option 'Add "name"' always visible with 'NOT ON BROAD YET' label
✓ Frontend: Crew members can be added and removed (testID=plan-crew-remove-0)
✓ Frontend: Discover screen uses SVG vector illustrations (NO raster tags)
✓ Frontend: Spiti Loop card shows MountainIllus (mountain peaks, sun, snow caps)
✓ Frontend: Live Ride map is STABLE - no reload/flicker during 15s test
✓ Frontend: liveMarker updates via postMessage (iframe count unchanged at 2)
✓ Frontend: Dark mode map with CartoDB dark tiles and orange rider pin
✓ Design: All Round 3 features match specification exactly

success_rate.backend: 95.2% (40/42 tests passed, 2 failures due to test data pollution)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Round 3 features working, critical bug fixed)

seed_data_creation: Created two test users for cross-user search testing: Alice Demo (alice_XXXXXX@test.com) and Pallav Kumar (pallav_XXXXXX@test.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Round 3 features working perfectly. Fixed critical bug in plan.tsx where place picker was missing conditional rendering. Backend users/search endpoint fully functional. Live Ride map stability confirmed via postMessage approach. SVG illustrations rendering correctly in Discover screen.

svg_vector_illustrations.verification: Spiti Loop shows MountainIllus, no raster tags found

notes: All Round 3 features working perfectly after fixing critical plan.tsx bug
Backend users/search endpoint fully functional with proper auth, validation, and self-exclusion
Live Ride map stability confirmed - postMessage approach prevents iframe reload
SVG illustrations rendering correctly based on trip keywords (himalaya, ghats, coast, road)
Crew picker allows both registered rider search and custom name entry
Test data pollution in 2 auth tests is not a real bug, just from previous test runs
All regression tests passed - no breaking changes to existing features

rca_of_issue.bug: Place picker overlaying crew picker in Plan screen
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Missing conditional rendering {pickerFor && ( before place picker View at line 277 in plan.tsx
reproduction_steps: 5. Place picker shows instead of crew picker
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Added {pickerFor && ( conditional before place picker View (line 277)
rca_of_issue.verification: After fix and Expo restart, crew picker opens correctly with search input and custom name option
